_doc: HP8 P3-01 stop-the-bleed megafile ceilings (Q25). Targets the *current* owner files — orchestrator-core/src/index.ts, user-do-runtime.ts, session-do-runtime.ts, runtime-mainline.ts, session-truth.ts. Wrapper / re-export files (nano-session-do.ts, user-do.ts) are intentionally excluded; their HP-era split made them facade shells that grow only by accident. Each entry is a stop-the-bleed ceiling — when an owner re-splits, the new ceiling MUST go down, never up. The gate accepts equal-or-below; any line count above triggers exit-1.
